title: Replace 'Memory Increase' text with 'NeuroBoost' throughout the app

requirements.text: Find and replace all occurrences of the text 'Memory Increase' (and any case variants like 'memory increase', 'Memory increase') with 'NeuroBoost' across all frontend source files, including page components, layout components, home page hero sections, game cards, headings, labels, button text, and any other visible UI text.

quotes: App ke andar ji memory increas likha hota hai use hatao aur NeuroBoost naam rakho
ऐप के अंदर जहाँ भी 'Memory Increase' लिखा हुआ है, उसे हटाकर 'NeuroBoost' से replace करना है

acceptanceCriteria: No visible text reading 'Memory Increase' (or any case variant) appears anywhere in the app UI
All previously 'Memory Increase' labeled text now displays 'NeuroBoost'
The app title/brand name 'NeuroBoost' remains unchanged in the header, browser tab, and SEO meta tags
All pages including HomePage, Layout header, and any game description cards are checked and updated

constraints: Do not change the app name 'NeuroBoost' in the header, browser tab title, SEO meta tags, or manifest.json
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not alter any backend logic or data models
nonGoals: Changing the app brand name NeuroBoost
Modifying SEO meta tags or Open Graph tags
